title: Verify Loss Aversion Modal Functionality and Prominence
description: Tests the behavior and UI of the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up when attempting to cancel.
preconditions: User has an active trial with 6 days remaining.

steps.description: 4. Verify the headline and body copy match the PRD, correctly stating '6 days'.
5. Verify the 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' button has high visual prominence.
6. Verify the 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' button has low visual prominence.

expected_result: The pop-up closes, the user remains on the Trial Corner page, and the 'Remind me' toggle is now activated. The trial remains active.
